translations.vi: Suy nghĩ này làm tôi sợ.

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner; nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Gedanke' as the subject.
Masculine noun; nominative singular; subject of 'macht'.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present); predicates that the subject causes something; part of light-verb construction 'jdm Angst machen'.
Personal pronoun; dative singular; indirect object/experiencer of 'macht'.
Feminine noun; accusative singular; internal object in the construction 'Angst machen'.

translations.en: The thought is calming me right now.
translations.fr: Cette pensée m'apaise en ce moment.
translations.zh-Hans: 现在这个想法让我平静。
translations.yue: 呢個諗法而家令我安心。
translations.pt: Este pensamento está me acalmando agora.
translations.tr: Bu düşünce şu anda beni sakinleştiriyor.
translations.vi: Bây giờ suy nghĩ này làm tôi bình tĩnh.
translations.nl: Deze gedachte stelt me nu gerust.
translations.hi: अभी यह सोच मुझे शांत कर रही है.
translations.el: Αυτή η σκέψη με ηρεμεί τώρα.
translations.sv: Den här tanken lugnar mig just nu.
translations.da: Denne tanke beroliger mig lige nu.
translations.fi: Tämä ajatus rauhoittaa minua juuri nyt.
translations.ja: 今、この考えが私を落ち着かせています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Gedanke' as the subject.
Masculine noun; nominative singular; subject of 'beruhigt'.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present); transitive; takes 'mich' as the direct object (patient).
Personal pronoun; accusative singular; direct object of 'beruhigt'.
Adverb; temporal; modifies 'beruhigt' to indicate the action is happening at the moment.

sentences.target: Mir kommt ein Gedanke beim Duschen.

translations.de: Mir kommt ein Gedanke beim Duschen.
translations.en: A thought comes to me while showering.
translations.es: Se me ocurre una idea mientras me ducho.
translations.fr: Une idée me vient sous la douche.
translations.it: Mi viene un'idea mentre faccio la doccia.
translations.zh-Hans: 洗澡时我突然想到一个主意。
translations.yue: 沖涼嗰陣我忽然諗到一個主意。
translations.ru: Мысль приходит ко мне в душе.
translations.pt: Uma ideia me vem no banho.
translations.tr: Duş alırken aklıma bir fikir geliyor.
translations.vi: Khi đang tắm, tôi chợt nảy ra một ý tưởng.
translations.nl: Onder de douche krijg ik een idee.
translations.uk: Під душем мені спадає на думку ідея.
translations.hu: Zuhanyzás közben eszembe jut egy ötlet.
translations.hi: नहाते समय मुझे एक ख्याल आता है.
translations.pl: Pod prysznicem przychodzi mi do głowy pomysł.
translations.el: Την ώρα που κάνω ντους, μου έρχεται μια ιδέα.
translations.nb: I dusjen får jeg en idé.
translations.sv: I duschen får jag en idé.
translations.ro: La duș îmi vine o idee.
translations.da: I badet får jeg en idé.
translations.ja: シャワー中にアイデアが浮かぶ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; dative singular; fronted experiencer; indirect object of 'kommt'.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present); in this construction, 'ein Gedanke' is the nominative subject that occurs to someone.
Indefinite article; nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Gedanke' (subject).
Masculine noun; nominative singular; subject of 'kommt'.
Preposition; fused form of 'bei dem'; selects dative; introduces the prepositional phrase 'beim Duschen' as a temporal/locative modifier.
Nominalized verb used as a neuter noun; dative singular due to 'beim'; object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Ein Gedanke lenkt mich beim Lernen ab.
sentences.reading: /aɪ̯n ɡəˈdaŋkə lɛŋkt mɪç baɪ̯m ˈlɛʁnən ap/

translations.de: Ein Gedanke lenkt mich beim Lernen ab.
translations.ipa: /aɪ̯n ɡəˈdaŋkə lɛŋkt mɪç baɪ̯m ˈlɛʁnən ap/
translations.en: A thought distracts me while studying.
translations.es: Un pensamiento me distrae mientras estudio.
translations.fr: Une pensée me distrait pendant que j'étudie.
translations.it: Un pensiero mi distrae mentre studio.
translations.ko: 공부할 때 어떤 생각이 저를 산만하게 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 学习时一个想法让我分心。
translations.yue: 溫書嗰陣有個諗法令我分心。
translations.ru: Какая-то мысль отвлекает меня во время учёбы.
translations.pt: Um pensamento me distrai enquanto estudo.
translations.he: בזמן הלימודים מחשבה מסיחה את דעתי.
translations.tr: Ders çalışırken bir düşünce dikkatimi dağıtıyor.
translations.vi: Khi học, một ý nghĩ làm tôi mất tập trung.
translations.nl: Tijdens het studeren leidt eine gedachte me af.
translations.uk: Під час навчання мене відволікає одна думка.
translations.hu: Tanulás közben egy gondolat eltereli a figyelmemet.
translations.hi: पढ़ते समय एक ख्याल मेरा ध्यान भटका देता है.
translations.pl: Podczas nauki jakaś myśl mnie rozprasza.
translations.el: Την ώρα που διαβάζω, μια σκέψη με αποσπά.
translations.nb: Når jeg studerer, blir jeg distrahert av en tanke.
translations.id: Saat belajar, sebuah pikiran mengganggu konsentrasi saya.
translations.sv: När jag pluggar distraheras jag av en tanke.
translations.ro: Când învăț, un gând mă distrage.
translations.cs: Při učení mě rozptyluje jedna myšlenka.
translations.da: Når jeg læser, bliver jeg distraheret af en tanke.
translations.fi: Kun opiskelen, jokin ajatus häiritsee minua.
translations.ja: 勉強していると、ある考えで気が散ります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article; nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Gedanke' (subject).
Masculine noun; nominative singular; subject of 'lenkt … ab'.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present); lexical verb that combines with separable prefix 'ab' to form 'ablenken' ('to distract').
Personal pronoun; accusative singular; direct object/patient of the verb.
Preposition; fused form of 'bei dem'; selects dative; introduces the prepositional phrase 'beim Lernen' (temporal context).
Nominalized verb used as a neuter noun; dative singular due to 'beim'; object of the preposition.
Separable verbal prefix; combines with 'lenkt' to form the verb 'ablenken' ('to distract'); appears clause-final here.
